notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Walker reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Pagés GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Pagés grounds into a double play, shortstop Carson Williams to second baseman Ben Williamson to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Jordan Walker to 3rd. Nathan Church out at 2nd. Pedro Pagés out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Pedro Pagés grounds into a double play, shortstop Carson Williams to second baseman Ben Williamson to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Jordan Walker to 3rd. Nathan Church out at 2nd. Pedro Pagés out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson singles on a ground ball to left fielder Nathan Church. Nick Fortes scores. Carson Williams to 3rd. Yandy Díaz to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson grounds into a force out, third baseman Nolan Gorman to shortstop Masyn Winn. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Chandler Simpson to 1st.
